---
  title: "Module IV"
---
  
  # Mathematical Modelling Techniques: From Theory to Practice
  
  ## Topics
  
  ### Introduction to Disease Modelling
  
  ### Compartmental Models
  
  ### SIR Models
  
  ### SEIR Models
  
  ### Vector-Borne Disease Models
  
  ### Parameter Estimation
  
  ### Model Calibration
  
  ### Sensitivity Analysis
  
  ## Practical Sessions
  
  - Arbovirus transmission modelling
- Forecasting outbreaks
- Evaluating interventions
